title: Mini-batch Gradient Descent Algorithm Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of mini-batch gradient descent, showing how it splits data, computes gradients, and updates parameters for optimization.
relationships: Start initializes parameters which feeds into Shuffle
Split Data feeds into For each Mini-batch loop
For each Mini-batch triggers Compute Gradient
Compute Gradient outputs to Update Parameters
Update Parameters feeds back to For each Mini-batch for next iteration
After all batches, loop outputs to Convergence Check
Convergence Check No loops back to Shuffle for new epoch
Convergence Check Yes outputs to End
